title: CMS Content Context Pack
description: Structured knowledge for public-facing content, landing pages, and publishable content dependencies.

objects.name: Content Entry
objects.description: Public page or post managed through the website surface.

objects.name: Content Block
objects.description: Embedded layout or component dependency such as fundraising CTA, form embed, or announcement module.

objects.name: Landing Dependency
objects.description: Cross-module asset needed for a published page to function.

relationships.description: Pages and posts are composed from one or more content blocks.
Embedded forms or campaign calls-to-action rely on downstream module objects.

available_actions.description: Load page metadata, embedded dependencies, and publish readiness evidence.
Inspect whether linked forms, campaigns, and routes are ready for public use.
Prepare a publish or dependency-fix proposal for approval through the secure enclave.

diagnostics.purpose: Catch content that references a draft form, inactive campaign, or missing route.
Detect content that appears published in Metis but is not ready for public consumption.

common_operational_issues.issue: Fundraising or announcement page publishes with broken dependencies.
likely_causes: content published before supporting modules were ready
inactive campaign or draft form embed

common_operational_issues.issue: Editors can view content status but cannot complete publication.
